R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custodyAccountContract', 'send customerLegitimationAndAccountDocuments') and executed_by(tree, 'send customerLegitimationAndAccountDocuments', 'marketSupport')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investmentAdvice', 'customerAdvisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetenceLevel >= C', 'conduct investmentAdvice')
R5: executed_by(tree, 'handle customerIdentificationAndLegitimation', 'customerAdvisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check suspectedMoneyLaundering', 'antiMoneyLaunderingOfficer')
